You can choose to make your username public or anonymous.
O ka kgetha ho etsa hore lebitso la hao la mosebedisi le phatlalatswe kapa le se ke la tsejwa.

You can go to the <datasetsPage>datasets page</datasetsPage>, select the version and language(s) you want, and download it! The files have <metadataLink>associated metadata</metadataLink>, such as demographic information and validation data. You’ll need to provide an email address to download the dataset.

O ka ya ho <datasetsPage>leqephe la dipokello tsa data</datasetsPage>, kgetha mofuta le (di)puo tseo o di batlang, mme o e download-e! Difaele di na le <metadataLink>metadata e amanang le tsona</metadataLink>, jwaloka dintlha tsa batho palo le data ya ho netefatsa. O tla hloka ho fana ka aterese ya imeile ho download-a pokello ya data.
You can help build a diverse, open-source dataset by creating a Common Voice profile and contributing your voice.
O ka thusa ho aha pokello ya data e fapaneng, ya mohlodio bulehileng ka ho theha profaele ya hao ya Common Voice le ho kenya lentswe la hao.
You can meet others in the Mozilla language communities by joining <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> for topical conversations, or <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> for quick advice.

O ka kopana le ba bang ba ditjhaba tsa dipuo tsa Mozilla ka ho kenela <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> bakeng sa dipuisano tsa sehlooho, kapa <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> bakeng sa keletso e potlakileng.
You cannot request your recordings while another request is already in progress.
O ke ke wa kopa direkoto tsa hao ha kopo e nngwe e ntse e tswelapele.
You can request a new takeout of your recordings every { $days } days.
O ka kopa ho direkoto tsa hao ka mora a mang le a mang { $days } matsatsi.

You can run events to help people contribute. It’s easier than you think. You could do it online with a videoconferencing tool, or in person if it’s safe. <eventTemplate>Check out our templates and resources for running events</eventTemplate>.

O ka tsamaisa diketsahalo ho thusa batho hore ba tlatsetse. Ho bonolo ho feta kamoo o nahanang. O ka e etsa ka marang-rang ka sesebediswa sa seboka-sa-video, kapa ka seqo haeba ho bolokehile ho etsa jwalo. <eventTemplate>Sheba mehlala le disebediswa tsa rona tsa ho tsamaisa diketsahalo</eventTemplate>.

You can <sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>add small numbers of sentences</sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>, or you can do <bulkImportDocsLink>bulk imports using Github</bulkImportDocsLink>. Remember that sentences need to be <licenseLink>CC0 (or public domain)</licenseLink>, or you can write your own.

O ka <sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>kenya dipalo tse nyane tsa dipolelo</sentenceCollectorLinkAdd>, kapa o ka etsa <bulkImportDocsLink>wa kenya tsa kantle ka bongata o sebedisa Github</bulkImportDocsLink>. Hopola hore dipolelo di hloka ho <licenseLink>CC0 (kapa phatlalatsa)</licenseLink>, kapa o ka ingolla tsa hao.
You can use the <scraperLink>Sentence extractor</scraperLink> to leverage short sentences from Wikipedia.
O ka sebedisa <scraperLink>Sesebediswa se hulang dipolelo</scraperLink> ho sebedisa dipolelo tse kgutshwanyane ho tloha Wikipedia.
You could include the website, e.g "Common Voice - https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/"
O ka kenyelletsa sebaka sa Marang-rang, mohlala, "Common Voice - https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/"
You could use academic referencing style, e.g Harvard style "Mozilla (2021) Common Voice. Available at https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/ (Accessed: 15th September 2021)"
O ka sebedisa mokgwa wa ditshupiso tsa thuto, mohlala, mokgwa wa Harvard "Mozilla (2021) Common Voice. E fumaneha ho https://commonvoice.mozilla.org/ (E fumanehile: ka la 15 Loetse 2021)"

You could use social media platforms to get the message out. Share posts that explain why it matters, and get in touch with other people talking about issues like language rights, voice AI, or bias in tech. See more advice on <campaignLink>running a social campaign, including content you can re-use</campaignLink>.

O ka sebedisa marang-rang a setjhaba ho fetisa molaetsa. Arolelana diposo tse hlalosang hore na ke hobaneng ho le bohlokwa, mme ikopanye le batho ba bang ba buang ka ditaba tse kang ditokelo tsa puo, AI ya lentswe, kapa leeme kahara thekenoloji. Sheba dikeletso tse ding mabapi le<campaignLink> ho tsamaisa letsholo la setjhaba, ho kenyelletsa le ditaba tseo o ka di sebedisang hape</campaignLink>.
You have not added any languages yet.
Ha o so kenye dipuo tse ding hohang.
You have not selected any languages. Please go to your <profileLink>Profile</profileLink> to select languages.
Ha wa kgetha dipuo di feng kapa di feng. Ka kopo e ya ho <profileLink>Profaele</profileLink> ho kgetha dipuo.
O tlameha ho dumella tshebediso ya maekrofounu.
You previously skipped sentences while reviewing. Resetting skipped sentences will show all skipped sentences again. This is independent of the language.
O ile wa tlola dipolelo ha o ntse o hlahloba. Ho hlophisa botjha dipolelo tse tlotsweng ho tla bontsha dipolelo tsohle tse tlotsweng hape. Sena se ikemetse ho puo.

Your accent is the way you pronounce words. It can be shaped by where you have lived, which other languages you speak and lots of other factors. You can share any information you feel is relevant here.

Puo ya hao ke tsela eo o bitsang mantswe ka eona. E ka boptjwa ke moo o kileng wa phela teng, dipuo tse ding tseo o di buang le dintlha tse ding tse ngata. O ka arolelana ka dintlha di feng kapa di feng tseo o utlwang eka di ka ba bohlokwa mona.
Your anonymous voice recordings will remain in the Common Voice dataset. Once you delete your profile you will no longer be able to submit a request to remove your recordings from the dataset

Direkoto tsa hao tsa lentswe tse sa tsejweng di tla sala ho pokello ya data ya Common Voice. Hang ha o hlakola profaele ya hao o ke ke wa hlola o kgona ho fana ka kopo ya ho tlosa direkoto tsa hao ho pokello ya data.
Your daily goal has been created
Sepheo sa hao sa letsatsi le letsatsi se entswe
You’re contributing to a target segment
O kenya letsoho karolong e lebeletsweng
You’re contributing to our first target segment
O kenya letsoho karolong ya sepheo sa rona sa pele
You're currently set to <bold>NOT</bold> receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice
Hajwale o se o ikemiseditse ho <bold>ESENG</bold> ho fumana di-imeile jwalo ka dikgopotso tsa sepheo, dintlha tse ntjha ka tswelopele yaka le dikoranta mabapi le Common Voice
You're currently set to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice
Hajwale o se o ikemiseditse ho amohela di-email jwaloka dikgopotso tsa sepheo, dintlha tse ntjha ka tswelopele yaka le dikoranta mabapi le Common Voice
Your files are being assembled. Please check again later.
Difaele tsa hao di ntse di kopanngwa. Ka kopo sheba hape hamorao.
Your username and email will not be associated with the published data.
Lebitso la hao la mosebedisi le imeile di ke ke tsa amahanngwa le data e phatlaladitsweng.
Your weekly goal has been created
Sepheo sa hao sa beke se entswe
You should receive an email shortly explaining the steps to get your language added to Common Voice
O lokela ho fumana imeile haufinyane e hlalosang mehato ya ho kenya puo ya hao ho Common Voice
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } recording goal!
O thusitse Common Voice ho fihlela <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> sepheo sa rona sa letsatsi le letsatsi { $goalValue } sa ho rekota!
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } validation goal!
O thusitse Common Voice ho fihlela <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> ya sepheo sa rona sa letsatsi le letsatsi sa { $goalValue } netefatso!
You've successfully signed up for contributing to { $language }. Thank you.
O atlehile ho ingodisa ho tlatsetsa ho { $language }. Rea leboha.
